title: Archetype Profile
description: Team's current archetype, confidence, radar chart of five metrics vs archetype centroid, and recommendations based on the 2025 DORA seven-archetype model. Includes link to wellbeing survey.

list.name: team
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT team_id FROM archetype_history ORDER BY team_id
list.label: Team

options.content:
Archetype Profile

Current team archetype, confidence, and recommendations based on delivery metrics and wellbeing data
Data refreshed every 5m from PostgreSQL archetype_history table | Wellbeing Survey

panels.title: Archetype
panels.description: The team's current archetype based on the latest classification.

targets.rawSql: SELECT archetype FROM archetype_history WHERE team_id = '$team' ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1;

panels.title: Confidence
panels.description: Confidence score (0-1) of the archetype classification. Confidence is capped at 0.65 when wellbeing survey data is not available.

targets.rawSql: SELECT confidence FROM archetype_history WHERE team_id = '$team' ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1;

panels.title: Confidence Limited Notice
panels.description: Shows warning when confidence is low due to lack of wellbeing survey data.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN confidence < 0.65 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS warning_flag FROM archetype_history WHERE team_id = '$team' ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1;

1.text: ⚠ Confidence limited — no wellbeing survey data

panels.title: Archetype Radar Chart
panels.description: Radar chart showing the team's normalized metric values (solid line) compared to the archetype centroid (dashed line). Metrics are normalized 0-1 where 1 is best.

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT
    archetype,
    deployment_frequency_norm AS df,
    lead_time_norm AS lt,
    fdrt_norm AS f,
    cfr_norm AS c,
    rework_rate_norm AS r
  FROM archetype_history
  WHERE team_id = '$team'
  ORDER BY recorded_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
centroids AS (
  SELECT
    archetype,
    CASE archetype
      WHEN 'Harmonious high-achievers' THEN 0.85
      WHEN 'Pragmatic performers' THEN 0.75
      WHEN 'Stable and methodical' THEN 0.65
      WHEN 'Constrained by process' THEN 0.60
      WHEN 'Legacy bottleneck' THEN 0.40
      WHEN 'High impact, low cadence' THEN 0.50
      ELSE 0.60
    END AS df_centroid,
    CASE archetype
      WHEN 'Harmonious high-achievers' THEN 0.85
      WHEN 'Pragmatic performers' THEN 0.75
      WHEN 'Stable and methodical' THEN 0.85
      WHEN 'Constrained by process' THEN 0.60
      WHEN 'Legacy bottleneck' THEN 0.40
      WHEN 'High impact, low cadence' THEN 0.50
      ELSE 0.60
    END AS lt_centroid,
    CASE archetype
      WHEN 'Harmonious high-achievers' THEN 0.85
      WHEN 'Pragmatic performers' THEN 0.75
      WHEN 'Stable and methodical' THEN 0.85
      WHEN 'Constrained by process' THEN 0.60
      WHEN 'Legacy bottleneck' THEN 0.40
      WHEN 'High impact, low cadence' THEN 0.50
      ELSE 0.60
    END AS f_centroid,
    CASE archetype
      WHEN 'Harmonious high-achievers' THEN 0.75
      WHEN 'Pragmatic performers' THEN 0.65
      WHEN 'Stable and methodical' THEN 0.85
      WHEN 'Constrained by process' THEN 0.60
      WHEN 'Legacy bottleneck' THEN 0.40
      WHEN 'High impact, low cadence' THEN 0.50
      ELSE 0.60
    END AS r_centroid
  FROM latest
)
SELECT
  
  'Deployment Frequency' AS metric,
  df AS value,
  df_centroid AS centroid
FROM latest, centroids
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Lead Time' AS metric,
  lt AS value,
  lt_centroid AS centroid
FROM latest, centroids
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'FDRT' AS metric,
  f AS value,
  f_centroid AS centroid
FROM latest, centroids
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Change Failure Rate' AS metric,
  c AS value,
  c_centroid AS centroid
FROM latest, centroids
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Rework Rate' AS metric,
  r AS value,
  r_centroid AS centroid
FROM latest, centroids
ORDER BY metric;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT archetype FROM archetype_history WHERE team_id = '$team' ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  CASE archetype
    WHEN 'Harmonious high-achievers' THEN 'Continue fostering psychological safety and recognition to sustain high performance and wellbeing.'
    WHEN 'Pragmatic performers' THEN 'Invest in team engagement initiatives to improve wellbeing while maintaining delivery speed.'
    WHEN 'Stable and methodical' THEN 'Gradually increase deployment frequency through automation and batch size reduction.'
    WHEN 'Constrained by process' THEN 'Identify and eliminate non-value-adding process steps to free up capacity for innovation.'
    WHEN 'Legacy bottleneck' THEN 'Prioritize technical debt reduction and system modernization to improve stability and morale.'
    WHEN 'High impact, low cadence' THEN 'Increase deployment frequency through CI/CD improvements and smaller batch sizes.'
    ELSE 'Focus on improving both delivery metrics and team wellbeing through targeted interventions.'
  END AS recommendation
FROM latest;

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT archetype FROM archetype_history WHERE team_id = '$team' ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  CASE archetype
    WHEN 'Harmonious high-achievers' THEN 'Regularly review workload distribution to prevent burnout during high-throughput periods.'
    WHEN 'Pragmatic performers' THEN 'Implement regular retrospectives focused on team happiness and sustainable pace.'
    WHEN 'Stable and methodical' THEN 'Experiment with feature flags and trunk-based development to enable faster feedback loops.'
    WHEN 'Constrained by process' THEN 'Adopt value stream mapping to quantify delays and target process improvements.'
    WHEN 'Legacy bottleneck' THEN 'Establish a dedicated tiger team for critical system modernization efforts.'
    WHEN 'High impact, low cadence' THEN 'Implement automated testing and deployment pipelines to reduce release friction.'
    ELSE 'Establish clear OKRs that balance delivery performance with team health metrics.'
  END AS recommendation
FROM latest;
